name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement or a new collector
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement

## What you'd like

<!-- Clear, short description of the feature. -->

## Why

<!-- The problem it solves or the use case. The *why* matters more
     than the *what*. -->

## Proposed approach (optional)

<!-- If you have an implementation idea, sketch it here.
     Otherwise skip — we'll discuss in the thread. -->

## Scope check

- [ ] This fits the "solo dev, local-first" design
- [ ] This doesn't require a SaaS backend
- [ ] I'm willing to help test / review the implementation
